case_title: CHUNG JAMES VS PARK PAUL JONG SOO

INVALID, CASE DEF IS PARK PAUL JONG SOO, BUT PESON SERVED IS PARK YOUNG HEE, THEREFORE SUB-SERVE BUT NO MLNG DONE. ALSO OTHER INFO MISSING.
